apps.pageDescription: Explore the comprehensive collection of SMART on FHIR healthcare applications — categorized by function for easy discovery
apps.heroSubtitle: A curated directory of SMART on FHIR applications transforming healthcare through open standards

intro.title: What is the SMART App Gallery?
intro.description: The SMART App Gallery is a centralized directory that connects healthcare apps and users. It offers developers a free, open way to share their SMART on FHIR applications and gives healthcare providers an easy way to discover, evaluate, and try compatible apps. Unlike single-vendor app stores, the gallery is not restricted to any single EHR platform.

clinical-decision-support.title: Clinical Decision Support
clinical-decision-support.description: Tools that assist clinicians with evidence-based risk calculations, diagnostic decision-making, and precision dosing recommendations at the point of care.

ai-analytics.title: AI & Intelligent Analytics
ai-analytics.description: Applications leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning to analyze health data, automate clinical queries, and provide predictive insights.

patient-engagement.title: Patient Engagement & Health Records
patient-engagement.description: Platforms empowering patients to collect, manage, aggregate, and share their health data across multiple healthcare systems and providers.

pediatrics.title: Pediatric Tools
pediatrics.description: Specialized applications for pediatric care including growth tracking, blood pressure percentile calculations, bilirubin management, and emergency resuscitation.

care-coordination.title: Care Coordination
care-coordination.description: Applications that streamline provider collaboration, specialist referrals, patient handoffs, and cross-organizational health information exchange.

medication-management.title: Medication Management
medication-management.description: Tools for medication reconciliation, adherence monitoring, prescription drug monitoring, and treatment plan management.

data-visualization.title: Data Visualization & Interoperability
data-visualization.description: Applications that present clinical data in innovative visual formats, enable patient education, and bridge interoperability gaps between systems.

clinical-research.title: Clinical Research
clinical-research.description: Applications that connect patients with clinical trials, streamline research data collection, and automate EHR-to-research data transfers.

appDescriptions.ASCVD Risk Calculator: Estimates a 10-year and/or lifetime cardiovascular risk score and provides guidance on how to potentially reduce risk through lifestyle and medical interventions.
appDescriptions.Cardiac Risk (Reynolds Risk Score): Uses the widely-adopted Reynolds Risk Score to estimate a patient's 10-year risk of heart attack or stroke, with interactive simulation for clinicians to explore risk reduction scenarios.
appDescriptions.Atrial Fibrillation Tool: Offers personalized risk profiles, clinical guidance, and interactive visualization of the benefits and harms of various treatments for atrial fibrillation.
appDescriptions.EBMcalc: The premier source of interactive Evidence-Based Medicine calculators, pre-populating clinical data via FHIR to save clinicians time while promoting evidence-based practice.
appDescriptions.CDS Connect: Pain Management Summary: Presents a comprehensive dashboard of pain-related information including diagnoses, medications, lab results, and assessment scores with visual cues for potential concerns.
appDescriptions.Colchicine CYP3A4/PGP Interaction App: Provides clinical decision support for identifying and managing drug interactions when a patient is prescribed both colchicine and a CYP3A4/PGP inhibitor.
appDescriptions.Risk Benefit: A centralized, searchable database for physicians to discuss risks and benefits of procedures and interventions with patients in an easy-to-understand manner.
appDescriptions.Chest Pain App: Retrieves and displays selected data relevant to a chest pain chief complaint from electronic health records and other clinical systems.
appDescriptions.CRC Prediction Tool: A prediction tool for colorectal cancer detection in symptomatic patients, integrating clinical data for risk assessment.
appDescriptions.Rx Studio: A HIPAA-compliant cloud platform providing clinical decision support for precision dosing using peer-reviewed PK/PD/PGx models.
appDescriptions.DoseMeRx: Integrates directly into EHR workflows to automatically extract patient data and calculate individualized drug doses based on how each patient responds to therapy.
appDescriptions.Healthsuite: Equips users to identify and test chronic cardiac and diabetes risks using multiple algorithms including heart failure mortality prediction and hospital readmission probability.
appDescriptions.AI-Powered Health Chart: A pioneering solution designed to offer physicians an efficient AI-driven way to access, understand, and analyze complex health data.
appDescriptions.AutoMed Query: Enables clinicians to query patient data using natural language, leveraging AI to translate clinical questions into structured FHIR data queries.
appDescriptions.Abstractive Health: A physician AI assistant that helps curate the optimal patient record by intelligently summarizing and organizing clinical information.
appDescriptions.DxPrime: A machine learning-powered analytical tool that provides diagnosis and procedure code suggestions, analyzing data from 3.2 billion patient visits.
appDescriptions.NLP2FHIR: A FHIR-based clinical data normalization pipeline developed at Mayo Clinic, applying NLP to identify clinical conditions from semi-structured discharge summaries.
appDescriptions.Kickcall AI: A HIPAA-compliant AI answering service built for healthcare clinics, ensuring every patient call is answered professionally during off-hours or peak times.
appDescriptions.CHF Predictive Analytics: Helps clinicians identify and assess chronic cardiac risks using predictive analytics models for congestive heart failure patients.
appDescriptions.CommonHealth: Helps patients collect and manage personal health data from 700+ sources including Mayo Clinic and Cleveland Clinic, sharing securely with trusted services.
appDescriptions.MyLinks: An interactive platform for patients to gather, manage, and share their medical information, linking them with physicians, researchers, and caregivers.
appDescriptions.1upHealth: Aggregates patient data from external health systems into one place, presenting demographics, medications, labs, conditions, and history in a unified timeline.
appDescriptions.Fasten Health: An open-source, self-hosted personal medical record aggregator supporting multiple EHR platforms for patient engagement and data visualization.
appDescriptions.OneRecord: Supports multiple FHIR versions (DSTU 2, STU 3, R4) across major EHR platforms for clinical research, population health, and patient engagement.
appDescriptions.PatientCare Portal: A connected healthcare model portal providing data consolidation, FHIR and PHR support, real-time device data collection, and health visualization.
appDescriptions.Carefluence Patient Portal: A comprehensive patient portal providing access to medical records, reports, and imaging studies through FHIR-based interoperability.
appDescriptions.C-Now: Enables providers to access patient records from anywhere using any device, with detailed tabs for Chart Summary, Documents, Vitals, History, and Demographics.
appDescriptions.Flexpa: A Patient Access connectivity layer (API) helping developers build experiences for health plan coverage verification and medical claims data viewing.
appDescriptions.AppScript: Classifies and evaluates 318,000+ digital health apps, enabling clinicians to electronically prescribe apps, devices, and digital content from their EMR workflow.
appDescriptions.Bilirubin App: A demonstration app designed to help clinicians treat newborn hyperbilirubinemia appropriately by visualizing bilirubin levels against treatment thresholds.
appDescriptions.SMART BP Centiles: A full-featured, clinically deployed app that calculates a child's blood pressure percentiles normalized by age, sex, and height.
appDescriptions.BP Centiles (Updated): An updated version of the open-source BP Centiles app with enhanced features and modern FHIR R4 support.
appDescriptions.Growth Chart: Demonstrates a high-performance, concise, minimal-click presentation of a child's growth over time with interactive graphs, data tables, and parent view.
appDescriptions.Growth Chart and Immunizations: Includes WHO growth charts (length, weight, head circumference) for ages 0-2 and CDC growth charts (height, weight) for children 2 years and older.
appDescriptions.Pediatric Growth Chart for iOS: Includes 32 official growth charts from WHO and CDC, optimized for iOS mobile use in pediatric clinical settings.
appDescriptions.Handtevy Hospital: An award-winning rapid resuscitation system for pediatrics and adults, providing weight-based medication dosing and emergency protocols.
appDescriptions.AristaMD: Enables more efficient patient care by connecting providers to specialists via eConsults, improving patient satisfaction and reducing unnecessary referrals.
appDescriptions.Convergent Provider Search: A provider search tool based on your FHIR API, ensuring you only need to update provider data once across all integrated systems.
appDescriptions.Cozeva: Displays patient care opportunities within the EHR as an embedded SMART on FHIR iFrame, allowing clinicians to review and address quality care gaps.
appDescriptions.Current Health: Enables healthcare organizations to personalize and scale home healthcare delivery with a single, flexible remote monitoring and care solution.
appDescriptions.ACT.md: Extends EMRs across the community, removing data silos that prevent addressing social determinants of health for better care coordination.
appDescriptions.HIE InContext: Provides information from participating Health Information Exchanges within the context of a clinician's existing EHR workflow.
appDescriptions.Physician Sign Out: A HIPAA-compliant patient hand-off app for providers that increases the quality of patient hand-off care through innovative, secure software.
appDescriptions.T System SMART App: Provides Emergency Department clinical content and an intuitive workflow, generating readable clinical narratives that export automatically to Epic.
appDescriptions.Doctor Care Portal: Works in conjunction with PatientCare Portal, enabling doctors to review vitals, inspect PHR and family history, and conduct secure messaging.
appDescriptions.Doximity on FHIR: View collaborating providers' contact information, education, and certifications within the EHR, and securely message care teams.
appDescriptions.Fullscript: Facilitates seamless creation and management of treatment plans across dozens of EHRs using SMART on FHIR, compliant with HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI-DSS.
appDescriptions.Meducation RS: Summarizes patients' complex medication regimens in a single page with detailed instructions for 5,000+ medications in patient-friendly language.
appDescriptions.MPR Monitor: Uses an algorithm developed at Boston Children's Hospital to predict poor medication adherence based on the patient's prescription and fill history.
appDescriptions.RxOrbit InWorkflow: Embeds medication lists, alerts, and PDMP information directly into a patient's record within the clinician's EHR or pharmacy system.
appDescriptions.MedTrue: Integrates different medication data sources to assist with medication reconciliation and adherence, producing a verified medication list within the EMR.
appDescriptions.COSRI: Clinical Opioid Summary with Rx Integration — a decision support app using Prescription Drug Monitoring Program (PDMP) data for safer opioid prescribing.
appDescriptions.DMEscripts: Simplifies the durable medical equipment ordering process so patients, providers, and suppliers all get what they need faster and more efficiently.
appDescriptions.Avatachart: Visualizes clinical data in 3D, helping users easily understand health, disease, and surgery information without requiring medical knowledge.
appDescriptions.Lush SMART on FHIR: Demonstrates connecting with multiple EMRs to provide clinical data for a specified patient, running on iOS, Android, and Windows devices.
appDescriptions.Aidbox Forms: Integrates FHIR-based questionnaires into your EHR or patient portal, supporting both practitioner and patient launch contexts.
appDescriptions.Krames On FHIR: Integrates into existing EHR systems and clinical workflows, helping providers print award-winning patient education materials at the point of care.
appDescriptions.SMART Precision Cancer Medicine: Open-source software presenting individual patients within the population-level spectrum of cancer somatic mutations for precision oncology.
appDescriptions.eDocSS: Co-developed with the American College of Surgeons to meet Commission on Cancer Synoptic Operative Report requirements for standardized surgical documentation.
appDescriptions.Clinical Trial Finder: An EHR-launch app that searches for clinical trials matching patient demographics and conditions, with full MIT-licensed open source code.
appDescriptions.Clinical Trials Search: Provides clinical trials matching embedded directly in the EHR, built on a reusable library that operates standalone or within server environments.
appDescriptions.ClinTrial Connector: An EHR-to-EDC connector that transfers 30-70% of trial data, reducing time spent on double data entry in clinical research workflows.
appDescriptions.SMART on FHIR Appointment Scheduler: Allows patients to securely view upcoming appointments, book new ones, and cancel existing ones through FHIR-compliant EHR integration.

galleryLink.title: Explore the Full Gallery
galleryLink.description: Visit the official SMART Health IT App Gallery for the most up-to-date application listings, try live demos, and discover new SMART on FHIR apps.
